prose:
**TEMPO frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO frontier-orbital gap from a DFT single-point frontier-orbitals calculation. Method used: tier `standard` with explicitly requested **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** in **PySCF**, exact four-center integrals (density fitting was not enabled). Geometry: fixed, user-supplied XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` with 29 atoms; not geometry-optimized in this task. Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge 0, multiplicity 2. SCF converged: true, in 12 cycles. Chemkit integrity trustworthy verdict: **true**.

Headline value: **HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV**.

Additional orbital values returned by chemkit: HOMO = -6.3375439 eV; LUMO = -2.4651235 eV. Total electronic energy = -483.88366 hartree = -13167.145 eV.

Warnings: none reported by chemkit (no warnings array was present in the returned result).

Reproducibility: chemkit command returned was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 2 --stdout json --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpj35ygjms/live.json`. Output JSON path: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpj35ygjms/live.json`. The tool result did not return a live `.out` log path, so I cannot honestly name one beyond the returned output JSON path.
